Name: Elisa Warsame
Description: Psiquiatrist who was hired by Marc Spector for mental asistance. She was paid her fee in advance. She told him he was brain damage. Her theory is his brain has conjured his different personalities to explain what happened to him. He is not insane. His brain has been colonized by an ancient consciousness from beyond space-time.
